title: trigger
text: trigger A script module that is associated with a system or user interaction event, such as storing data, changing a field value, adding an occurrence, and so on. It is fired when the event occurs, and depending on the exit value, may cause other triggers to be executed. U8: ^NEXT_FIELD activates (not "fires") the Leave Field trigger. A group of related triggers can be referred to by the common item in their name, for example, the "Validate triggers" include validate, validateKey, validate. (Strive to avoid this if possible.) Related Links script module A named collection of ProcScript (in which JavaScript may be embedded) that can have parameters and a return value. The way in which the module can be called depends on its type, which can be a trigger, web trigger, operation, web operation, function, or entry. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
